export const meta = {
  title: "Background Repeat",
  description: "Set the repeat behavior for background images.",
};

<Baseline path="css.properties.background-repeat" />

<Reference category="background" name="background-repeat" />

## Usage

### Repeat

The background image repeats horizontally & vertically.

<Preview>
  <div
    className="br-r bp-c h-s"
    style={{
      backgroundImage:
        "url('data:image/svg+xml;base64,')",
    }}
  >
    <div className="p-10"></div>
  </div>
</Preview>

```html "br-r"
<div class="br-r bp-c h-s" style="background-image: url('...');">
  <div class="p-10"></div>
</div>
```

The background image does not repeat.

<Preview>
  <div
    className="br-nr bp-c h-s"
    style={{
      backgroundImage:
        "url('data:image/svg+xml;base64,')",
    }}
  >
    <div className="p-10"></div>
  </div>
</Preview>

```html "br-nr"
<div class="br-nr bp-c h-s" style="background-image: url('...');">
  <div class="p-10"></div>
</div>
```

The background image repeats & resizes to fit the area.

<Preview>
  <div
    className="br-ro bp-c h-s"
    style={{
      backgroundImage:
        "url('data:image/svg+xml;base64,')",
    }}
  >
    <div className="p-10"></div>
  </div>
</Preview>

```html "br-ro"
<div class="br-ro bp-c h-s" style="background-image: url('...');">
  <div class="p-10"></div>
</div>
```

The background image repeats horizontally only.

<Preview>
  <div
    className="br-rx bp-c h-s"
    style={{
      backgroundImage:
        "url('data:image/svg+xml;base64,')",
    }}
  >
    <div className="p-10"></div>
  </div>
</Preview>

```html "br-rx"
<div class="br-rx bp-c h-s" style="background-image: url('...');">
  <div class="p-10"></div>
</div>
```

The background image repeats vertically only.

<Preview>
  <div
    className="br-ry bp-c h-s"
    style={{
      backgroundImage:
        "url('data:image/svg+xml;base64,')",
    }}
  >
    <div className="p-10"></div>
  </div>
</Preview>

```html "br-ry"
<div class="br-ry bp-c h-s" style="background-image: url('...');">
  <div class="p-10"></div>
</div>
```

The background image repeats & spaces evenly.

<Preview>
  <div
    className="br-s bp-c h-s"
    style={{
      backgroundImage:
        "url('data:image/svg+xml;base64,')",
    }}
  >
    <div className="p-10"></div>
  </div>
</Preview>

```html "br-s"
<div class="br-s bp-c h-s" style="background-image: url('...');">
  <div class="p-10"></div>
</div>
```

### Responsiveness

Use breakpoint prefixes to target different screen sizes. Styles apply from the breakpoint & up.

Target viewport sizes with breakpoint prefixes.

<ResponsiveVariant class="br-r" variant="br-nr" prefix="br">
  ### Breakpoint variant
</ResponsiveVariant>

### Hover State

Apply styles conditionally on hover using the `h:` prefix.

<HoverVariant class="br-r" variant="br-nr" prefix="br">
  ### Hover variant
</HoverVariant>
